tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows a markedly low HbA1c, which may suggest recent hypoglycemia or a condition affecting red cell turnover. Glucose is at the lower end of normal. All other parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly decreased total CO₂, which may indicate mild metabolic acidosis or compensated respiratory alkalosis. Clinical correlation is recommended.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provider Organization: Azienda Sanitaria Locale n° 7 Musei
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
